scripts.install-all: npm install --unsafe-perm && npm install --prefix backend --unsafe-perm && npm install --prefix frontend --unsafe-perm
scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend --unsafe-perm && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend --unsafe-perm && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
